jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Hypercity
jsonLd.description:
We at Hypercity are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Kanpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hypercity:
Hypercity is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hypercity!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
